New York Minute (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,018,364Details
International Box Office $7,138,351
Worldwide Box Office $21,156,715
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,962,106 (42.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,006 opening theaters/3,006 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,998,337

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 7th, 2004 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 1st, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 17th, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild sensuality and thematic elements.
Running Time: 91 minutes
Geographical setting: New York, New York City
Plot point: Twins, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Target audience: Tween
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
